branding.label: Branding & Identity
branding.blurb: Identity systems and rollouts — from a national bank launch applied at architectural scale to a shelf of considered logotypes.

campaign.label: Campaign & Social
campaign.blurb: The bulk of the work — always-on campaign and social systems built to a relentless calendar for some of the region's biggest brands.

web.label: Web & Interface
web.blurb: Digital front-ends and interface design — bold, high-contrast websites for print houses and brands.

print.label: Print & Environmental
print.blurb: Work built for physical space and the street — large-format murals, banners, vehicle wraps and out-of-home.

illustration.label: Illustration
illustration.blurb: A self-initiated line-art series exploring how much expression survives in a single, continuous stroke.

absa.tagline: Announcing a bank's arrival at the scale of a building.
absa.deliverables: Building wrap, branch signage, launch press
absa.challenge: Barclays' transition to Absa had to feel like a genuine arrival, not a rename.
absa.approach: The bold red identity was pushed to architectural scale — a full building wrap, branch posters and coordinated launch press.
absa.results: A high-visibility, unmistakably cohesive rollout that put Absa on the map across Botswana.

logos.tagline: Marks with meaning, across a range of industries.
logos.challenge: A spread of businesses each needing a distinct, memorable identity.
logos.approach: Concept-led logotypes and symbols spanning hospitality, law, retail, beauty and lifestyle.
logos.results: A versatile library of marks that each own their category.

woolworths.tagline: Premium retail moments with a personal touch.
woolworths.challenge: Elevate in-store events and merchandise to match a premium retailer.
woolworths.approach: Refined event invitations and custom apparel that stayed true to the Woolworths tone.
woolworths.results: On-brand collateral for key retail activations.

orange.tagline: A national telco kept fresh, campaign after campaign.
orange.challenge: Keep a leading telecoms brand energetic across a constant stream of campaigns.
orange.approach: High-energy layouts, device-led hero art and a disciplined orange system carried from 5G launch to everyday social.
orange.results: A recognisable, flexible campaign toolkit that scales from billboards to feed.

images.caption: For Good Connections Day — hero poster

hilton.tagline: Always-on hospitality content, holiday to holiday.
hilton.challenge: A full calendar of events, runs and offers all needing consistent hotel-grade polish.
hilton.approach: A warm, photographic content system spanning festive offers, fun runs, dining and cultural moments.
hilton.results: A steady, on-brand social presence with dozens of coordinated executions.

bifm.tagline: Making investment and finance feel human.
bifm.deliverables: Pathfinder campaign, Kids Money Camp, mailers, events
bifm.challenge: Soften and warm up finance messaging without losing authority.
bifm.approach: Friendly, approachable campaigns running from landing pages and static posts to flyers and event invites.
bifm.results: A noticeably warmer brand tone across every touchpoint.

ausc.challenge: Rally a regional sports body's audience around a run of events.
ausc.approach: Energetic, athlete-forward posts, countdowns and a comprehensive social series.
ausc.results: A cohesive campaign identity carried across every event.

premier.tagline: Workwear that works, season to season.
premier.challenge: Drive retail apparel promotions across changing seasons.
premier.approach: A product-led, seasonal social system — from Back-to-School to Independence.

nandos.challenge: Bring a local activation to life in Nando's famously cheeky voice.
nandos.approach: Playful, team-led posts built around a relay activation.
nandos.results: On-brand local content that felt unmistakably Nando's.

bokomo.challenge: Keep a staple FMCG brand top of mind on shelf and feed.
bokomo.approach: Appetising press and social artworks with strong, simple appetite appeal.

bomaid.challenge: Present a medical-aid offering with clarity and warmth.
bomaid.approach: Clean, confident pitch and social layouts that put people first.
bomaid.results: Clear, trustworthy communication of a complex offering.

shell.challenge: Sustain a recurring monthly social feed for an energy brand.
shell.approach: A consistent branded monthly content system.
shell.results: A dependable content cadence, always on brand.

paperclip.tagline: "Image is power." A print house, online.
paperclip.challenge: A printing & branding company needed a bold, unmissable online presence.
paperclip.approach: A high-contrast interface with a punchy yellow accent and a confident hero.
paperclip.results: A digital front-end matching the energy of the brand — paperclipbw.com.

johnboatile.challenge: Give an individual a clean, credible online home.
johnboatile.approach: A restrained, typographic interface focused on the work.

turnstar.tagline: An industrial brand with a digital front.
turnstar.challenge: Translate an industrial products brand into a modern web experience.
turnstar.results: A polished digital storefront for the brand.

bitc.tagline: Putting Botswana on the world stage.
bitc.deliverables: Wall murals, directional banners, taxi branding, expo
bitc.challenge: Brand a marquee international summit at full environmental scale.
bitc.approach: Large-format wall murals, directional banners, vehicle wraps and expo branding working as one system.
bitc.results: An immersive event environment that carried across the venue and the city.

lit.challenge: Command attention in high-traffic out-of-home placements.
lit.approach: Bold, high-impact metro campaign layouts built to read at speed.

reactions.tagline: How much expression survives a single stroke?
reactions.challenge: A self-initiated exploration of expression through minimal, continuous line work.
reactions.approach: A set of monoline faces and forms, each a distinct "reaction" in the same visual language.

identity.name: Farai Thabang Ratshee
identity.location: Based in Botswana · Open to work
